title: Muddy Hands Pack of 2 Airtight Glass Storage Jars 2000ml – Large Clear Food Containers with Lids & Clamp Seal – Ideal for Pasta, Rice, Cereal, Coffee, Tea & Kitchen Pantry Organisation
features: ✅ Large Capacity Storage (2000ml) – Each airtight glass jar holds up to 2 litres, making them ideal for storing pasta, rice, cereals, flour, biscuits, coffee, tea, and more.
🔒 Airtight Seal with Clamp Lid – Features a secure metal clamp and silicone gasket to keep food fresh for longer, protecting against moisture, air, and odours.
🍝 Space-Saving Design – Tall cylindrical shape (Diameter: 9.5cm – Height: 33cm) fits neatly in cupboards, shelves, or kitchen counters without taking up too much space.
🌿 Premium Glass Quality – Made from durable, clear glass that is odourless, BPA-free, and easy to clean – ensuring safe food storage and long-lasting use.
🏡 Pack of 2 for Kitchen Organisation – Perfect set for creating a stylish and organised pantry; great for dry goods, snacks, or even decorative storage in your home.
